title: Rekt on Hyperliquid: Ep1.
summary_title: Trippy Wolves bridge to Hyperliquid, official NFTs incoming at 50K+
summary_description: Wreck Gang migrates NFT collection, discusses ecosystem collections, DeFi yields, and the impending Hyperliquid official NFT drop.
